CustomFunction.name: SQL.GetColumn
CustomFunction.Calculation: /** * * get the values in a field using two WHERE field searches * * @param {reference} columnField * @param {reference} whereField * @param {string} whereValue * @param {reference} whereField2 * @param {string} whereValue2 * * @returns {string} the list of values in the field targeted with 'columnField' * * @module fm-sql-cfs * @see https://github.com/karbonfm/fm-sql-cfs * * @history 2017-11-19, todd@geistinteractive.com * */ Let( [ sql = SQL.GetColumnStatement (columnField; whereField ; "?" ) ]; ExecuteSQL ( sql ; "" ;"" ; whereValue ) )

CustomFunction.name: SQL.GetColumn2Fields
SQL.GetColumnStatement
CustomFunction.Calculation: /** * * get the values in a field using two WHERE field searches * * @param {reference} columnField * @param {reference} whereField * @param {string} whereValue * @param {reference} whereField2 * @param {string} whereValue2 * * @returns {string} the list of values in the field targeted with 'columnField' * * @module fm-sql-cfs * @see https://github.com/karbonfm/fm-sql-cfs * * @history 2017-11-17, todd@geistinteractive.com * */ List( "SELECT " & SQL.GetFieldName ( theField ); "FROM " & SQL.GetTableName ( theField ); Case( not IsEmpty( GetFieldName( whereField) ) ; "WHERE " & SQL.GetFieldName(whereField) & "=" & whereValue; "" ) )

CustomFunction.name: SQL.GetFieldName
SQL.GetRecordsAsJSON
SQL.GetTableName
SQL.RecordExists
CustomFunction.Calculation: /** * * tests to so if the record target by the SQL Where Field exists * often used to see if a record with a primary key exists * * @param {refernce} WhereField the field to search with SQL * @param {string} WhereValue * * @returns {boolean} * * @module fm-sql-cfs * @see https://github.com/karbonfm/fm-sql-cfs * * @history 2017-11-17, todd@geistinteractive.com * */ SQL.GetColumnStatement ( WhereField ; WhereField ; WhereValue ) <> ""
